name: Kofax Intelligent Automation Platform API
what_it_does: Kofax (Tungsten Automation) intelligent document processing (IDP) and robotic process automation (RPA) REST API for enterprise document capture, extraction, and workflow automation. Enables AI agents to manage document capture and OCR processing for intelligent document automation, handle document classification and routing for automated document workflow, access structured data extraction from invoices, forms, and contracts for IDP automation, retrieve RPA bot management and task automation for process automation orchestration, manage accounts payable invoice processing and three-way match for AP automation, handle insurance claims document processing for claims management automation, access mortgage and loan document automation for financial services IDP, retrieve compliance document management and audit trail for regulated industry documentation, manage intelligent capture from email, scan, and mobile for omnichannel document intake, and integrate Kofax with ERP, ECM, and BPM platforms for end-to-end document process automation.
use_cases: Processing invoices from AP automation agents
Extracting insurance claims from claims agents
Capturing documents from intake automation agents
Orchestrating RPA from process automation agents
not_for: Simple document storage without workflow automation
Consumer document scanning without enterprise process automation
Unstructured content analytics without document process focus
best_when: An enterprise AP team, insurance operations, financial services firm, or government agency wanting AI agents to automate document capture, intelligent extraction, classification, and workflow routing for high-volume document processes.
avoid_when: OCR DATA ACCURACY FOR FINANCIAL RECORDS: Automated invoice and financial document extraction must have human review workflow for extracted amounts and vendor data; automated OCR errors in three-way match can create incorrect payments and AP reconciliation issues. HIPAA PHI IN CLINICAL DOCUMENT PROCESSING: Automated Kofax processing of healthcare documents containing PHI requires HIPAA BAA and minimum necessary data handling; automated extraction and retention of PHI beyond processing purpose creates HIPAA violation. IRS FORM DATA ACCURACY: Automated extraction of IRS forms (W-2, 1099, tax returns) for financial services must validate extracted values against source document; automated incorrect form data in downstream tax or lending decisions creates regulatory compliance risk. RPA bot change management — automated RPA bot deployment changes in production environment must go through change management testing; automated bot modification without regression testing creates process failure in dependent business workflows.

auth.notes: Kofax (Tungsten Automation since 2023 rebrand) uses OAuth 2.0 and API key. REST API with JSON. Irvine, California HQ. Founded 1985. Private (TA Associates PE → rebranded to Tungsten Automation 2023). Intelligent automation market leader. AP automation, insurance, financial services, government focus. FedRAMP authorized. 25,000+ enterprise customers. Competes with OpenText Capture, ABBYY, and Rossum for IDP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-transaction or enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription; volume-based transaction pricing for IDP
pricing.notes: Irvine CA. TA Associates PE. Rebranded to Tungsten Automation 2023. Founded 1985. 25,000+ enterprise customers. FedRAMP authorized. Per-transaction and enterprise licensing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; document processing throughput limited by OCR/AI processing capacity; documented per enterprise agreement

known_agent_gotchas: TUNGSTEN AUTOMATION REBRAND API MIGRATION: Kofax rebranded to Tungsten Automation in 2023; verify current API endpoint domains and authentication after rebrand; documentation may reference both Kofax and Tungsten branding with inconsistent API references

DOCUMENT PROCESSING LATENCY IS ASYNC: Kofax IDP document processing for complex multi-page documents is asynchronous with processing time of seconds to minutes; automated workflows expecting synchronous document extraction must implement polling or webhook callback for processing completion

OCR CONFIDENCE THRESHOLD ENFORCEMENT: Automated extracted value acceptance must enforce minimum OCR confidence threshold; automated downstream decisions on low-confidence extractions without human review creates data quality and financial accuracy risk

Three-way match exception routing — automated AP three-way match must route PO variance exceptions above configured tolerance to human reviewer; automated payment release on unresolved three-way match exceptions creates duplicate payment and fraud risk

RPA bot change management in production — automated RPA bot configuration changes must go through change control and regression testing; automated bot modification without testing creates cascading process failure in dependent ERP and ECM workflows

PHI document processing HIPAA minimum necessary — automated healthcare document processing must apply HIPAA minimum necessary; automated extraction and storage of all PHI fields from clinical documents beyond processing purpose creates HIPAA violation
agent_readiness.security_notes: IDP and RPA platform. FedRAMP, SOC2, ISO27001, HIPAA, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US/EU/UK/APAC. Document and extracted data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Intelligent automation. FedRAMP, SOC2, HIPAA, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US/EU/UK/APAC. Document extraction data.
